query:
-- 1. Criar a purchase (compra) com status completed e 12 meses de validade
INSERT INTO purchases (
  customerName, customerEmail, campaignName, campaignSlug,
  planType, amountPaid, currency, status, plainPassword,
  isTrial, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'Guilherme',
  'guilhermeram@gmail.com',
  'Futebol Fraterno 2026',
  'fraterno2026',
  '1_year',
  37450,
  'BRL',
  'completed',
  'admin123',
  false,
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- 2. Criar o campeonato vinculado à purchase
INSERT INTO campaigns (
  name, slug, organizerName, organizerEmail,
  isActive, isDemo, purchaseId, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'Futebol Fraterno 2026',
  'fraterno2026',
  'Guilherme',
  'guilhermeram@gmail.com',
  true,
  false,
  LAST_INSERT_ID(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
